title: Chevron Pattern Table Runner Dining Kitchen Linen Tableware Tablecloth Cover 13" x 90" (Silver)
features: These traditional table runners have a chevron pattern throughout and would make the perfect finishing touch for your dining table throughout the year.
Available in Black, Coffee, Cream, Red, Silver, Teal or White,
In the following sizes: 13" x 72" (33cm x 180cm) or 13" x 90" (33cm x 228cm).
These runners are machine washable at 40c and can be tumble dried on a low heat setting and ironed on a warm heat setting.
Please note that all measurements are approximate and may vary slightly. Photographs are for illustrative purposes only.
